description: Canonical catalog of JarvisVR holographic widgets. Single source of truth consumed by agent-backend (validation + tool schemas) and unity-client (widget_type -> prefab). Conforms to docs/PROTOCOL.md s5.6 (The Holographic Object) and s8.5 (perception widgets).

widgets.title: Weather Orb
widgets.description: A floating, glanceable orb showing current conditions for a city, with an optional multi-day forecast that expands on tap.

events.name: expand_forecast
events.description: User tapped the orb to expand or collapse the forecast.

events.name: inspect
events.description: User dwelled (gaze/hover) on the orb to reveal details.

city.description: City or location name to display.

widgets.title: 3D Chart
widgets.description: A volumetric data chart (bar, line, scatter, pie, or surface) with one or more series, axis labels, and selectable data points.

events.name: rotate
events.description: User dragged to rotate the chart.

labels.description: Category labels for the primary axis.

widgets.title: 3D Model Viewer
widgets.description: Loads and displays a 3D model (glTF/GLB/OBJ/FBX) that the user can grab, spin, and scale; supports auto-rotate and named animations.

events.name: rotate
events.description: User dragged to rotate the model.

name.description: Display name / caption for the model.

format.description: Asset format hint for the loader.

auto_rotate.description: Continuously spin the model when idle.

animation.description: Name of an embedded animation clip to play.

scale_factor.description: Uniform scale applied to the loaded model.

widgets.title: Info Panel
widgets.description: A flat glass/solid panel for rich text content organized into optional sections; the workhorse container for readable information.

body.description: Primary body text (plain or lightweight markdown).

example_props.title: Mission Briefing
example_props.body: Three objectives are outstanding for today's flight test.

sections.heading: Objectives
sections.text: Calibrate thrusters; verify telemetry uplink; run pre-flight checklist.

sections.heading: Weather
sections.text: Clear skies, light wind from the west.

widgets.title: Text Label
widgets.description: A lightweight floating text primitive for captions, headings, and annotations anchored in space.

widgets.title: Button
widgets.description: A pressable holographic button that emits an event on tap or dwell; used for confirmations and quick actions.

events.name: dwell_select
events.description: User selected the button via dwell.

icon.description: Optional icon id from the client icon set.

action_id.description: Semantic id echoed back in the press event so the agent knows what was invoked.

widgets.title: Timer
widgets.description: A countdown or stopwatch with play/pause/reset controls; emits control events the agent reacts to.

widgets.title: Media Player
widgets.description: Plays an audio or video source with transport controls and a scrubber; emits play/pause, seek, and volume events.

widgets.title: 3D Map
widgets.description: An interactive tilted 3D map centered on a coordinate, with markers, zoom, and pan; emits marker selection and navigation events.

widgets.title: Smart Home Panel
widgets.description: Controls a group of smart-home devices (lights, thermostat, locks, plugs, etc.) with toggles and sliders; emits device control events.

events.name: set_level
events.description: User set a device level (brightness, temperature, volume).

devices.description: Devices shown and controllable in this panel.

state.description: Current device state. Common keys below; device-specific keys are allowed.

level.description: Generic level 0-100 (e.g. brightness, volume, blind position).

unit.description: Optional unit for the device's primary value, e.g. 'C' or '%'.

widgets.title: To-do List
widgets.description: A checkable list of tasks with optional priorities; emits toggle and selection events as the user checks items off.

widgets.title: Image Board
widgets.description: A grid, carousel, or stack of images with captions; emits selection/navigation events as the user browses.

events.name: prev
events.description: User went back in the carousel.

widgets.title: Vision Annotation
widgets.description: A world-anchored callout that labels a real object Jarvis recognizes, with optional confidence, detail text, and a leader line to the target.

events.name: inspect
events.description: User dwelled to reveal more detail.

leader_line.description: Draw a line from the callout to the target.

target_object_id.description: Object/anchor id of the real object being annotated.

target_position.description: World position of the target point (meters).

widgets.title: 3D Bounding Box
widgets.description: A volumetric box drawn around a detected real-world object, with a label and confidence.

size.description: Box extents [width, height, depth] in meters.

filled.description: Render translucent faces instead of just edges.

widgets.title: Live Captions
widgets.description: A rolling caption panel that displays speech Jarvis hears in real time (ambient transcript / translation).

max_lines.description: How many lines to keep visible.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag of the captions.

translated.description: True if these captions are a translation.

lines: How can I help you today?
example_props.speaker: other

widgets.title: Vision Feed
widgets.description: A small panel showing what Jarvis currently sees through the passthrough camera, with detection overlays and a freeze control.

frame_url.description: URL/data-uri of the latest frame snapshot.

widgets.title: Scene Label
widgets.description: A lightweight pin/label dropped at a point in the room (e.g. spatial-memory markers like 'keys last seen here').

pin.description: Show a pin/dot anchor under the label.

widgets.title: Clock
widgets.description: A floating analog or digital clock for a given timezone.

widgets.title: World Clock
widgets.description: Several clocks for different cities/timezones at a glance.

widgets.title: Calendar
widgets.description: A calendar/agenda surface showing events for a day, week, or month.

widgets.title: Stocks Ticker
widgets.description: A scrolling ticker of stock/crypto symbols with prices and percentage changes.

widgets.title: News Feed
widgets.description: A scrollable feed of news headlines with sources and summaries.

articles.headline: Quest 4 announced
articles.summary: Meta unveils its next mixed-reality headset.

widgets.title: Translator
widgets.description: A live translation panel for text, conversation, or signs read from the camera.

widgets.title: Recipe Card
widgets.description: A step-by-step cooking card with ingredients, timings, and a current-step highlight.

events.name: next_step
events.description: User advanced to the next step.

events.name: prev_step
events.description: User went to the previous step.

widgets.title: Whiteboard
widgets.description: A free-form sketch surface the user can draw on with hand strokes.

widgets.title: Sticky Note
widgets.description: A colored sticky note that can be placed and pinned in space.

events.name: edit
events.description: User tapped to edit the note.

widgets.title: Code Viewer
widgets.description: A syntax-highlighted code panel with optional line highlighting and copy.

widgets.title: Document Viewer
widgets.description: A paged document viewer for PDFs, markdown, or text.

widgets.title: Web Panel
widgets.description: An interactive browser surface that renders a web page in space.

widgets.title: Jarvis Avatar
widgets.description: Jarvis's visual presence (orb/face/ring) that reflects agent state and emotion.

widgets.title: Navigation Arrow
widgets.description: A wayfinding arrow/beam pointing toward a destination, with distance and ETA.

direction.description: Unit direction vector to the destination.

widgets.title: Health Rings
widgets.description: Activity/fitness rings showing progress toward daily goals.

widgets.title: Music Visualizer
widgets.description: An audio-reactive 3D visualizer with now-playing info.

widgets.title: Network Graph
widgets.description: A 3D node/edge graph for relationships, networks, or knowledge graphs.

widgets.title: Data Table
widgets.description: A scrollable, sortable table of rows and columns.

rows.description: Each row maps column key -> value (open object; keys match columns).

widgets.title: Measuring Tape
widgets.description: A spatial measurement tool that reports distance, area, or angle between placed points.

points.description: World-space points [x, y, z] in meters.

widgets.title: Pomodoro Timer
widgets.description: A focus/break Pomodoro timer with session tracking and controls.

events.name: skip
events.description: User skipped to the next phase.

widgets.title: AI Image Viewer
widgets.description: Displays AI-generated images with the prompt, generation status, and progress.

example_props.prompt: a neon city skyline at night, synthwave

widgets.title: Volumetric Globe
widgets.description: An interactive 3D Earth with markers and great-circle arcs.

highlight_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2/3 country code to highlight.

widgets.title: System Launcher
widgets.description: An app/widget launcher grid for opening JarvisVR apps and tools.

widgets.title: Notification Toast
widgets.description: A transient notification banner with severity, optional actions, and auto-dismiss.

events.name: expand
events.description: User dwelled to expand the notification.

widgets.title: Settings Panel
widgets.description: A grouped settings surface with toggles, sliders, selects, and buttons.

value.description: Current value (boolean, number, or string depending on type).
